name: clankie
description: A minimal personal AI assistant built on pi's SDK

scripts.build:web-ui: cd web-ui && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf web-ui-dist && cp -r web-ui/.output/public web-ui-dist
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run build:web-ui
scripts.typecheck:all: tsgo --noEmit && cd web-ui && npx tsgo --noEmit && cd ../extensions/clankie-memory && npx tsgo --noEmit && cd ../clankie-json-ui-render && npx tsgo --noEmit && cd ../clankie-sandbox && npx tsgo --noEmit
